title: Dealing with immune-mediated neuropathies during COVID-19 outbreak: practical recommendations from the task force of the Italian Society of Neurology (SIN), the Italian Society of Clinical Neurophysiology (SINC) and the Italian Peripheral Nervous System Association (ASNP).

journal_full: Neurological sciences : official journal of the Italian Neurological Society and of the Italian Society of Clinical Neurophysiology
